title: Home Essentials Professional Manicure Pedicure Nail Art Tool Set 3 Pieces
description:
Whether you plan to use this manicure or pedicure toolset is at home, or in a professional nail salon, prepping the nail base with these essential tools will make all the difference at the end of any nail treatment. The manicure pedicure toolset includes nail clippers, a cuticle trimmer and lastly, a cuticle remover and shaper fork; these tools will to ensure natural nails are at their best before receiving nail polish, gel nail polish, nail art or acrylic nails, prolonging the longevity of any nail treatment

Home Essentials Professional Manicure Pedicure Nail Art Tool Set 3 Pieces

Whether you plan to use this manicure or pedicure toolset is at home, or in a professional nail salon, prepping the nail base with these essential tools will make all the difference at the end of any nail treatment. The manicure pedicure toolset includes nail clippers, a cuticle trimmer and lastly, a cuticle remover and shaper fork; these tools will to ensure natural nails are at their best before receiving nail polish, gel nail polish, nail art or acrylic nails, prolonging the longevity of any nail treatment.

As mentioned above, the three-piece manicure pedicure toolset for nail art comes with three important tools:

Key Features

  • MANICURE PEDICURE TOOLS SET: A professional set of three manicure pedicure tools, your set includes nail clippers, a cuticle trimmer and a cuticle remover fork; all are essential tools in carrying out a proper manicure or pedicure to ensure the nail base is ready for nail polish, nail art, gel nail polish or acrylic nail applications
  • NAIL CLIPPERS: A cuticle trimmer is an absolutely essential tool to have for a manicure or pedicure, as it helps to shape the nails base and prep it before nail polish, gel polish, nail art or acrylic nails are applied; the cuticle trimmer is essential for trimming back overgrown cuticles and removing dead skin around the nails
  • CUTICLE TRIMMER: A cuticle trimmer is an absolutely essential tool to have for a manicure or pedicure as it gently trims away at overgrown cuticles allowing the nail bed and nail base to breathe and most importantly, preps and shapes the nail bed before applying nail polish, nail art or acrylic nails
  • CUTICLE REMOVER FORK: This cuticle remover or cuticle pusher is great for trimming, pushing and shaping cuticles; the blade can also scrape leftover residue on nails from gel polish or glue left behind from acrylic nails
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Suitable for home or salon use; Country of Origin: China; Tool kit sold as a set of three that includes nail clippers, cuticle remover fork and cuticle trimmer; Material: Stainless Steel

Product Specifications

  • MPN: HE3PCNTS
  • UPC: 855569002114
  • Color: Blue
  • Size: Small

NAIL CLIPPERS: Nail clippers are the first place to start with a manicure or pedicure to ensure nails are cut to yours or a client's desired nail length; the nail clipper features curved blades in order to better follow your nail shape for easy and accurate clipping

CUTICLE TRIMMERS: A cuticle trimmer is an absolutely essential tool to have for a manicure or pedicure, as it helps to shape the nails base and prep it before nail polish, gel polish, nail art or acrylic nails are applied; the cuticle trimmer is essential for trimming back overgrown cuticles and removing dead skin around the nails

CUTICLE REMOVER & SHAPER FORK: This cuticle remover or cuticle pusher is great for trimming, pushing and shaping cuticles in conjunction with the cuticle trimmer; the blade can also scrape leftover residue on nails from gel polish or glue left behind from acrylic nails which must be removed before applying a new treatment

If you’re thinking of giving yourself a manicure at home, or a trained nail technician or cosmetologist who just needs a fresh set of essential, basic manicure pedicure tools to use at work, look no further than this economical, functional, three-piece Professional Manicure Pedicure Nail Art Tool Set! These easy to handle tools will ensure any manicure or pedicure nail treatment lasts longer and stands up to everyday wear-and-tear, allowing you to prep the nail base for intricate nail art, a simple nail polish application or for artificial or acrylic nails.
